productDisplayName: Nike Women Transform Grey Sports Shoes
description: Style Note The nike Transform III shoe offers outstanding comfort and support for the demanding athlete. This lightweight shoe is for the runner who wants to make a bold statement without sacrificing comfort and performance. Product Details Canvas upper with synthetic overlays for enhanced durability Perforations on the forefoot for breathability Lace up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue, collar and footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection TPR outsole with flex grooves on the forefoot for ease of movement Waffle-pattern lugs for grip and traction Scooped heel for extra cushioning to the backfoot Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
